Project Y

프로젝트 Y

"Two women. One heist. Zero regrets."

5.8
2026MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Trapped in Gangnam's most dangerous streets, Mi-sun and Do-kyung stake everything on one last desperate gamble—only to uncover a hidden stash of dirty cash and gold that could finally buy their freedom.
